rationale.R1.3: The claim of 'consistent improvement across all subgroups' contradicts the data presented, as Fitzpatrick I-III and small lesions underperform Fitzpatrick IV-VI and large lesions respectively.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is not disclosed for any recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (lack of uncertainty quantification and significant performance gap between Fitzpatrick I-III and IV-VI).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
